lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test empty install, real upgrade, version skew, interruption, retry, forward repair, rollback boundary, backup restore, and deployment coordination. Artifact under review: compatible TypeScript service migration chain.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Feed Ts Migration Test Matrix, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, cast one convenient XML object as a feed, omit reader and publisher outcomes, source and emitted revision, discovery and SSRF scope, Atom and namespace cases, entity and dangerous-key limits, unknown runtime validation, Fetch stream and AbortSignal ownership, PostgreSQL client, Promise settlement, tenant, accessibility, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as feed-service proof.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test empty install, real upgrade, version skew, interruption, retry, forward repair, rollback boundary, backup restore, and deployment coordination.
